rule.name: color soft CA
rule.message: In Canadian English, "colour" is often preferred.

rule.name: favorite soft CA
rule.message: In Canadian English, "favourite" is often preferred.

rule.name: center soft CA
rule.message: In Canadian English, "centre" is often preferred.

rule.name: behavior soft CA
rule.message: In Canadian English, "behaviour" is often preferred.

rule.name: organise soft CA
rule.message: In Canadian English, "organize" is often preferred.

rule.name: realise soft CA
rule.message: In Canadian English, "realize" is often preferred.

rule.name: defense soft CA
rule.message: In Canadian English, "defence" is often preferred.

rule.name: analyse soft CA
rule.message: In Canadian English, "analyze" is often preferred.
